name: node-p-locate
title: node-p-locate
description:
async version of Array
Get the first fulfilled promise that satisfies the provided testing function.
.
Array.prototype.find(): The find() method returns the value of the first
element in the array that satisfies the provided testing function. p-locate is
async version of this function.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-p-locate because async version of Array.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-p-locate as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-p-locate with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-p-locate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
